## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Chrome version: [e.g. 120]
- Steem Tools version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (console errors, the node/API server
you were using, etc.).
